title: History Leaf Pruning
text: Home * Search * Selectivity * Pruning * History Leaf Pruning History leaf pruning , a pruning technique based on history counters . The idea is to prune moves that are <= 0 depth after reductions and are below a given history threshold. History Leaf Pruning showed up as an option in Fruit 05/11/03 by Fabien Letouzey . Sample Code [ edit ] if (node_type != NodePV) { if (!in_check && played_nb >= 5 && !extended) { value = sort->value; // history score if (value < HistoryThreshold) { new_depth -= 1; if (value < LeafThreshold) continue; // History Leaf pruning reduced = true; } } } See also [ edit ] Bobby's Strategic Quiescence Search Butterfly Boards Butterfly Heuristic Futility Pruning History Heuristic Late Move Reductions Reductions Relative History Heuristic Forum Posts [ edit ] Re: Possible search improvment by Ryan Benitez , CCC , June 17, 2009 » ProbCut Can someone explain this? by Michel Van den Bergh , CCC , October 07, 2009 » Toga Up one Level
